[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)

- Description: Capoeira dao-client swap (PR2): execution plan + handoff to Sophia (topic 1658), gated on @1.0.1
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/367
  
  Details:
  Drafted the capoeira → @truesight_dao/dao-client swap plan and handed it to Sophia in topic 1658. Grounded it in the actual swap surface (capoeira/assets/js/practice-event-submit.js: base64 helpers, generateKeypair, publicKeyToSlug, signRequestText to swap; buildPracticeEventText/submitSession/backfillUnsent/getCvUrl stay inline). Wrote CAPOEIRA_DAO_CLIENT_SWAP_PLAN.md with the post-oracle-outage gates: depend on @1.0.1 (NOT the broken 1.0.0 global-shape build), verify the unpkg URL 200 in-PR, RUNTIME smoke test asserting the global shape (node --check can't catch the API mismatch that broke oracle twice), fix CDN load order (no blind defer), map-before-delete, open-PR-don't-auto-merge. Discovered the pre-existing master roadmap (TRUESIGHT_DAO_CLIENT_JS_ROADMAP.md) was stale (claimed scope @truesight, version 0.1.0, global window.TruesightDaoClient — all wrong) and corrected it + repointed the registry row to the dedicated plan. Refreshed Sophia's context clone; she confirmed, read the plan, and correctly PARKED PR2 until @1.0.1 lands (dependency on the global-shape fix in topic 1638). All commits carry the Generated-by trailer.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
